title: tenants — rollout flags
description: Rollout / change-management flags for THIS module. DISTINCT from `features.json` (business features — 'does the tenant have athletes at all'). These are delivery controls per SOC 2 CC8.1: canary rollouts, kill switches, cohort gates. Every business change lands behind a flag here; the flag flips 100% on general availability and is removed once burned in.

flags.description: Turns off self-serve tenant registration (`POST /api/v1/tenants/register`) without redeploying. Use in incidents when provisioning is compromised.
Feature-gates the whole Domain CRUD surface. Toggle off to hide the domain section from the SPA + reject writes.
Multiple Branding profiles per tenant with a domain_id FK. Enabled for federations first (they need regional sub-brands); rolls out to everyone once battle-tested.
TenantIntegration surface. In v1 the controllers return 501; flipping this ON per tenant enables the real controllers. When ON for 100% for 30d, controllers become the default and this flag retires.
When ON, a tenant cannot be marked `active` until it has at least one verified DPO contact. Rolled out to EU + UK first.
Reject Branding saves where primary_color + background_color fail WCAG 2.2 AA contrast (SC 1.4.11). Off in v1 (dev-preview only), on in v2.

retirementPolicy.description: A flag lives at most 90 days after reaching 100% GA. After 90d, either the flag is deleted OR it converts to a `kill-switch` (with a documented recovery use case). Prevents flag-registry sprawl.
